help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: We'll find answers to your questions
help.description: Find the information you need in the sections below or contact a manager directly.
help.managerDesc: Your personal manager will help you
help.techSupportDesc: Contact us if you have issues
help.faqQ1: How can I earn through VEM Media?
help.faqA1: Earning is very simple: purchase one of the convenient VIP packages, watch short daily videos and trailers, and receive a guaranteed USDT reward for each successfully completed task. The reward amount increases with your VIP level — from M1 to M10, the reward per video grows.
help.faqQ2: How do daily tasks work and how long do they take?
help.faqA2: Every day you are assigned a certain number of short videos (trailers) according to your VIP level. After watching each video to the end, the USDT reward is instantly credited to your account. All tasks are typically completed within 10-20 minutes.
help.faqQ3: What are the withdrawal conditions and schedule?
help.faqA3:
Go to the "Profile" section and tap the "Withdraw" button. Minimum withdrawal starts from 2 USDT. The withdrawal commission may change in real time depending on exchange rates. Requests are processed promptly from Monday to Saturday:

🇺🇸 USA (EST): 01:00 — 07:00
🇹🇷 Turkey: 09:00 — 15:00
🇩🇪 Germany: 07:00 — 13:00
🇷🇺 Russia (MSK): 09:00 — 15:00
🇺🇿 Uzbekistan: 11:00 — 17:00
help.faqQ4: Why does the withdrawal commission change?
help.faqA4:
VEM Media operates with international cryptocurrency exchanges in real time. Network fees on exchanges can go up or down depending on market conditions — this is completely normal.

If you want to withdraw funds with stable conditions, use the local bank card withdrawal method — it is not subject to crypto network fees.
help.faqA5: This is a free 3-day trial period to get familiar with the system. As an Intern, you can learn how the platform works. To earn fully and withdraw funds, you need to upgrade to M1 or a higher VIP level. At the Intern level, you can watch up to 3 videos per day.
help.faqQ6: What happens when my VIP package expires and how do I renew?
help.faqA6: Once the package expires, daily video tasks will be temporarily paused. To continue earning, you can repurchase your current package or upgrade to a higher VIP level. Simply go to the VIP page, select the desired package, and make the payment.
help.faqQ7: How does the referral program work?
help.faqA7:
Our platform features a 3-level income system. Invite friends through your personal link and earn commission when they purchase a VIP package:

• Level 1: 9% commission
• Level 2: 3% commission
• Level 3: 1% commission

Full commission is paid on first purchase or upgrade. If your referral repurchases the same package (after expiry), commission is paid at 50% of the standard rate.

You can get your referral link through the "Share" button on the Profile page.
help.faqQ8: When and how is referral income calculated?
help.faqA8: Your referral income is automatically credited to your account as soon as the user you invited purchases a VIP package. Full commission (9%/3%/1%) is paid on first purchase or upgrade to a new level. When the same level is repurchased, commission is reduced to 50%. You can track your income on the "Profile" page.
help.faqQ9: How secure is my account and data?
help.faqA9: The VEM Media platform is protected by modern security technologies. All data is stored in encrypted form. To protect your account, use a strong password and never share it with anyone. If suspicious activity is detected, the system automatically blocks the account.
help.faqQ10: What is the VEM Fund investment module?
help.faqA10: VEM Fund is an investment opportunity on the platform. You can invest your funds in various investment plans and receive percentage returns over a set period. Each plan has its own interest rate and term. Investment income is calculated daily, and you can track growth in real time.
help.faqQ11: How do I install the VEM app on my phone?
help.faqA11: Tap the "Install App" button in your browser on our website. VEM Media will be installed directly on your phone's home screen just like a real app and takes up no storage space. For iOS, in Safari press "Share" → "Add to Home Screen".
help.faqQ12: Who should I contact for technical issues?
help.faqA12: For any technical issues or questions, contact our technical support service via Telegram: @vem_ms. You can also share experiences with other users in the official community (@Vem_Official). We operate Monday through Saturday, 09:00—18:00.
help.faqQ13: What happens if a video doesn't load during a task?
help.faqA13: No need to worry at all! Our system handles these situations automatically. If a partner company's video trailer is temporarily unavailable, the platform instantly selects an alternative video from another partner studio's content library. This process takes just a few seconds, and your task will never be cancelled. This usually indicates that the partner studio's daily viewing quota has been reached — which shows the high demand for content on our platform. Our library of thousands of movies and trailers is constantly updated!
help.faqQ14: Is there a specific time to complete daily tasks?
help.faqA14: Yes, tasks are available every day from Monday to Saturday. Sunday is a rest day. Each VIP level has its own daily video viewing limit. For example, Intern — 5 videos, VIP1 — 10 videos, and so on. Once you complete your daily limit, new tasks will automatically open the next day.

welcome.title: Welcome to VEM Media
welcome.subtitle: A quick guide to the platform
welcome.greeting: Welcome! Here is a brief overview of the three main sections of the platform so you know exactly where to start.
welcome.step1Desc: Go to the Tasks section to watch short videos from partner streaming platforms. You earn a fixed reward for every video you complete.
welcome.step2Desc: Invite friends and earn automatic commissions across 3 levels when they join. Find your referral link in the Referral section.
welcome.step3Desc: Grow your balance passively in the Fund section. Choose a plan, invest, and receive daily returns for the plan duration.
welcome.step4Desc: Your referral manager or curator is your first point of contact. For other issues reach our support team on Telegram.

landing.heroDesc: Major streaming platforms like Netflix, Amazon Prime, HBO, and Disney+ partner with VEM to grow their audience. You watch — you earn. It's that simple.
landing.featuresDesc: Everything you need to start earning while enjoying your favorite content.
landing.featureWatchDesc: Stream content from top platforms and earn rewards for every minute you watch.
landing.featureEarnDesc: Receive consistent daily earnings based on your VIP tier and activity level.
landing.featureReferralDesc: Invite friends and earn commissions from 3 levels of referrals automatically.
landing.featureSecureDesc: Bank-grade security with encrypted transactions and 2-layer password protection.
landing.stepsDesc: Start earning in just 3 simple steps.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up in under a minute. No complex verification needed to get started.
landing.step2Desc: Complete daily tasks by watching content from partner streaming platforms.
landing.step3Desc: Withdraw your earnings anytime directly to your card or crypto wallet.
landing.faqDesc: Everything you need to know about VEM platform.
landing.faq1Q: How does the VEM platform work?
landing.faq1A: VEM partners with major streaming services (Netflix, Amazon Prime, HBO, Disney+) who allocate marketing budgets to grow their audience. Users earn a share of these budgets by completing daily content viewing tasks. This is a modern affiliate and promotional marketing model used by leading digital companies worldwide.
landing.faq2A: Your earnings depend on your subscription plan. Start free with the Trial plan. Each plan defines the number of daily tasks and the payout per task. Plans range from Trial to M1 through M10 — 11 tiers total. Higher tiers mean more daily tasks and higher payouts per task.
landing.faq3Q: Do I need to pay to get started?
landing.faq3A: No! You can explore the platform completely free with the Trial plan. Complete daily tasks to understand how the system works. When you're ready to scale your earnings, you can upgrade to a higher plan at any time.
landing.faq4Q: How do I withdraw my earnings?
landing.faq4A: Withdraw your earnings via bank card (Visa/Mastercard) or cryptocurrency (USDT BEP-20). Minimum withdrawal amounts and fees are transparently displayed. Funds are processed within 24 hours on business days.
landing.faq5A: Yes. VEM uses bank-grade security: 2-layer password protection (login password + financial PIN), end-to-end transaction encryption, session management, and real-time monitoring. Suspicious activity is automatically blocked.
landing.faq6Q: Does the platform have official documentation?
landing.faq6A: VEM operates under digital agreements as a global digital platform — just like Netflix, Spotify, and other international services. Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Partnership Agreement are publicly available on the platform. You review and accept these documents during registration.
landing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of users who earn daily by watching their favorite content. Get started in under a minute.
